title: Bump storage to v1.61.0, image to v5.38.0, and common to v0.66.0
body:
Vendor storage v1.61.0 and image v5.38.0 into common.  Then bump common to v0.66.0 in preparation for Podman v5.7


<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6437**
